appearance_rows.caveat_summary: Inherits host appearance across theme, density, focus, contrast, motion, and tokens.
Inherits most host appearance; declares reduced density and high-contrast support in charts.
Claims full inheritance; high-contrast parity not yet proven, so the badge stays unverified.
Inherits theme color only; density, focus, contrast, and tokens use private styling.

extension_inheritance_gap_rows.downgrade_notes: Inherits host appearance across theme, density, focus, contrast, motion, and tokens.
Inherits most host appearance; declares reduced density and high-contrast support in charts.

gap_axes.caveat: High contrast inherits host tokens partially.

known_unsupported_states.summary: Compact density keeps a fixed chart row height.
Chart series colors are fixed under forced-colors dark.

extension_inheritance_gap_rows.downgrade_notes: Claims full inheritance; high-contrast parity not yet proven, so the badge stays unverified.

gap_axes.caveat: High contrast inheritance is claimed but not yet proven by a host probe.

extension_inheritance_gap_rows.downgrade_notes: Inherits theme color only; density, focus, contrast, and tokens use private styling.

gap_axes.caveat: Density uses private styling, not host tokens.
Focus ring uses private styling, not host tokens.
High contrast uses private styling, not host tokens.
Reduced motion inherits host tokens partially.
Host tokens uses private styling, not host tokens.

known_unsupported_states.summary: Toolbar buttons draw a custom focus outline, not the host ring.
Toolbar icons keep fixed colors under forced-colors modes.
Toolbar spacing uses a private scale instead of host tokens.
